title: Add test-file marker
what_changed: A new top-level file `test-file.txt` is added as a standalone change marker containing a timestamped line. No refactoring, bug fixes, or configuration changes are included in this branch.
risk_assessment: Risk is very low because the change only adds a single text file and does not modify application logic or configuration. The only concern is whether this placeholder file is intentional and should live at the repository root.
